results.title: DEI Entrenchment: 7 Colleges Suggesting That ‘White Supremacy’ Persists in America
results.description: FIRST ON THE DAILY SIGNAL—A new report exposes seven colleges and universities for featuring statements about “white supremacy” that, the report’s authors say, provide the intellectual framework for racial discrimination in admissions, even after a recent Supreme Court ruling invalidated racial quotas. “Everything on the campuses is framed through a racial lens,” Bill Jacobson, a...

results.title: New ethics complaint targets U.S. Sen. Gallego
results.description: A nonpartisan oversight organization filed a Senate ethics complaint on Wednesday against U.S. Sen. Ruben Gallego, D-Arizona, over a social media statement he made about President Donald Trump and campaign spending, The Center Square has learned.

results.title: City leaders on ICE concerns, community trust
results.description: When discussing the city's long-term vision for "peace and security," Tremonton city leaders found themselves asking a fundamental question: What makes people feel safe enough to call police, attend community events and participate in civic life amid the national immigration...

results.title: Watch Live: Carson City Supervisors weighs new dog parks, parking overhaul, axing cultural commission, and more today
results.description: The Carson City Board of Supervisors is convening today, Thursday July 16 to decide on several high-profile community and infrastructure proposals, including the final approval of an ordinance overhauling downtown [...] The post Watch Live: Carson City Supervisors weighs new dog parks, parking overhaul, axing cultural commission, and more today appeared first on Carson Now .

results.title: 'Obvious Propaganda': Jeff Bezos Sparks Outrage With $9.4Million Earth Fund Grant for Atlanta Park Makeover
results.description: Jeff Bezos' million-dollar gift for a park makeover is receiving some pushback from concern locals and social media users.
